scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blue,red,white,gray,bgCyan,bgYellow,bgGreen" --prefix "[{name}]" --names "frontend,auth,user,product,order,cart,review,warehouse,admin,notification,upload" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/user-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/product-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/order-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/cart-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/review-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/warehouse-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/admin-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/upload-service"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blue,red,white,gray,bgCyan,bgYellow,bgGreen" --prefix "[{name}]" --names "frontend,auth,user,product,order,cart,review,warehouse,admin,notification,upload" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix services/auth-service" "npm start --prefix services/user-service" "npm start --prefix services/product-service" "npm start --prefix services/order-service" "npm start --prefix services/cart-service" "npm start --prefix services/review-service" "npm start --prefix services/warehouse-service" "npm start --prefix services/admin-service" "npm start --prefix services/notification-service" "npm start --prefix services/upload-service"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/user-service && npm install --prefix services/product-service && npm install --prefix services/order-service && npm install --prefix services/cart-service && npm install --prefix services/review-service && npm install --prefix services/warehouse-service && npm install --prefix services/admin-service && npm install --prefix services/notification-service && npm install --prefix services/upload-service
